arts.ttl: Leicester City and Manchester United keen on 19-year-old forward – Developments could be on the way
arts.sum: Inter Milan’s Francesco Pio Esposito has ended up on the radar of Leicester City and Manchester United. That’s according to Sportitalia, who share their own updates and information from journalist Alfredo Pedullà. He claims the 19-year-old has ‘attracted interest’ from Leicester City and Manchester United. Last summer, the Serie A side let him join Spezia The post Leicester City and Manchester United keen on 19-year-old forward – Developments could be on the way appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Legal action over Leicester City helicopter crash
arts.sum: Vichai Srivaddhanaprabha was killed alongside four others in the helicopter crash in October 2018.

arts.ttl: Family of former Leicester City owner killed in helicopter crash sue makers for £2.15bn
arts.sum: Vichai Srivaddhanaprabha’s relatives demand compensation from Italian firm Leonardo six years after his death The family of Leicester City’s former owner, who was killed in a helicopter crash outside the club’s stadium in 2018, have launched a lawsuit against the company which made the aircraft. Vichai Srivaddhanaprabha’s family are suing the Italian aerospace and defence company Leonardo SpA for £2.15bn – the largest fatal accident claim in English history, according to the family’s lawyers. arts.ttl: Legal action over Leicester City helicopter crash
arts.sum: Vichai Srivaddhanaprabha was killed alongside four others in the helicopter crash in October 2018.

arts.ttl: Former Leicester owner's family launch £2.15bn claim over fatal helicopter crash
arts.sum: A £2.15 billion legal claim has been launched over the helicopter crash that killed Leicester City's former owner, a PR firm acting for his family has said.

arts.ttl: Family of former Leicester owner files $2.6 billion fatal accident claim after helicopter crash
arts.sum: The family of former Leicester soccer club owner Vichai Srivaddhanaprabha has filed the largest fatal accident claim in English history after the Thai billionaire died in a helicopter crash in 2018, representatives said Friday. “My father trusted Leonardo when he bought that helicopter but the conclusions of the report into his death show that his trust was fatally misplaced,” said Aiyawatt, who succeed Vichai as chairman of Leicester.

arts.ttl: Leicester City seal move for Parma’s Woyo Coulibaly
arts.sum: Serie A side Parma had seen Woyo Coulibaly get linked to a host of other Italian sides but it seems as if he is on his way to Premier League…

arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho star, Dutch network - Leicester City's 15-man transfer shortlist for priority deal - Josh Holland - Leicestershire Live
arts.sum: Leicester City have little excuse not to sign a right-back in the January transfer window after James Justin's torrid time this season. Leicester have been expected to use the Dutch market under Van Nistelrooy and Ajax's Anton Gaaei could be available having only started eight games this season.
